report.summary: Pyth Network guide landed on disk since last cycle; Sanctum now confirmed on disk (previously flagged missing). Publish cycle promoted 5 pages. FOCIL guide promoted but directory missing from /learn — potential ghost promotion. Middleware noindex issue still unresolved.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic delta vs last cycle: flat — overnight US hours, minimal session volume expected
No new keyword breakouts detected; impressions and CTR stable across existing rankings
Top pages holding: ETH staking calc, liberation-day post, exchange compare hub, DCA calc, gas tracker
CRITICAL (carry-over): Middleware noindex still blocks ~684 of 742 sitemap pages from indexing — actual indexable footprint remains ~58 pillar pages (8%)
New content on disk since last cycle: Pyth Network oracle guide (02:32 UTC) — not yet indexed or in sitemap

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since last standup (v2, 02:06 local): publish cycle ran (02:17), Pyth Network guide built and landed (02:32)
Pyth Network: page.tsx (32.7KB) + OG SVG + data file (learn-20260410-v2.ts) all on disk — ready for publish queue
Sanctum Solana LST guide: NOW ON DISK (page.tsx + OG SVG) — was flagged as missing/worktree in v2, now resolved
FOCIL guide: promoted by publish cycle but /learn/focil-inclusion-lists-guide-2026/ directory does NOT exist on disk — ghost promotion risk
4 tool pages promoted (wallet-profiler, social-sentiment, wallet-security-audit, news-feed) — warnings on metadata/JSON-LD
Still blocked in queue: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets — no page.tsx (monad has parallel-evm variant, not exact match)
Total learn pages on disk: 168 page.tsx files

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1) FIX CRITICAL: Sync middleware PILLAR_PAGES with PUBLISHED_PAGES — 684 pages de-indexed. Every cycle this persists is lost crawl budget. This remains the #1 blocker.
2) INVESTIGATE: FOCIL guide was marked 'promoted' by publish cycle but directory doesn't exist on disk — verify Vercel deploy source vs local disk, prevent future ghost promotions
3) ADD TO QUEUE: Pyth Network + Sanctum guides are now on disk with full assets — promote to PUBLISH_QUEUE for next publish cycle

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $699 (3× standup $135 + publish $55 + build $233 + design $60 + 2× eod $126 + standup-v3 $45 = $654 prior + $45 this)
